Enroll — Individual Enroll — Family Patient Portal Login

Wayne, PA · Philadelphia Main Line

Concierge Medicine in Wayne, PA

This is concierge medicine. The monthly fee just doesn't require a second mortgage. Every member gets same-day access, unhurried visits, and a physician whose panel is capped at 250 — structured on the Direct Primary Care model.

What It Means

What Is Concierge Medicine?

Concierge medicine (also called boutique medicine or retainer medicine) is an approach to primary care where patients pay a membership fee in exchange for enhanced access and a deeper relationship with their physician. The core promise is simple: a doctor with time for you.

👥

Small Patient Panel

Your doctor knows you by name and history. At FFM, we cap our panel at 250 patients per physician — less than half the size of most DPC practices.

⚡

Same-Day Access

Same-day availability for acute issues. Routine visits within 24 hours. Many questions resolved by phone or message — no visit required.

📱

Direct Physician Contact

Call or text your doctor directly. You will not reach an answering service, a nurse line, or a portal message that takes three days to answer.

⏱️

Visits Without a Clock

Appointments are scheduled to fit the conversation — not to hit a billing threshold. Complex visits get the time they need.

🎯

Proactive Prevention

We don't wait for you to get sick. We schedule preventive reviews, track labs over time, and follow up on recommendations proactively.

💰

Actively Lowers Your Costs

Wholesale lab pricing, medications at cost, and fewer urgent care visits. The goal: your total healthcare spend goes down as an FFM member.

The Comparison

How Forward Family Medicine Compares

Traditional concierge medicine charges a premium retainer on top of — or instead of — insurance billing. DPC removes the insurance overhead entirely, which is what allows FFM to deliver the same concierge experience at a fraction of the cost.

Feature Traditional Concierge Forward Family Medicine
Patient panel size 300–600 patients ~250 patients per physician
Monthly cost $150–$500+/month $200/mo individual; family from $175 down to $100/person
Insurance billing Often still billed Never — no insurance billing for primary care
Visit length 30–60 minutes 1–2 hours
Direct doctor access Yes Yes — phone, text, email directly
Lifestyle Medicine Rarely included Board-certified, in-person, every visit

Same experience. Lower overhead. Better medicine. Learn more about how DPC works →

The Difference

The Concierge Experience at Forward Family Medicine

Your Doctor's Personal Attention

Dr. Bigley and Dr. Lieberman maintain a purposefully small panel of members. That means every patient receives the kind of attention that simply isn't possible in a practice seeing 20–30 patients a day.

When you call, you speak directly with your doctor or a team member who knows your name. When you send a message, you receive a thoughtful response — not a portal notification pointing you back to schedule an appointment.

A Practice That Actively Lowers Your Costs

Concierge medicine has a reputation for being expensive. We think it should be the opposite. Because we know you well and you can reach us directly, we help you avoid the urgent care visits, redundant tests, and reactive ER trips that quietly inflate the cost of traditional care.

We dispense medications at cost and order labs at wholesale pricing — so when something is needed, it's not a financial event.

Who It's For

Who Benefits Most from Concierge-Style DPC?

💼

Busy Professionals

When you can't afford to spend three hours waiting at urgent care, having same-day access to your own doctor — by phone, video, or in-person — changes everything.

👨‍👩‍👧‍👦

Families with Children

One membership covers a family. Having a physician who knows your children's history — and yours — makes routine and urgent care far simpler and more reassuring.

🩺

Adults with Chronic Conditions

Diabetes, hypertension, and thyroid disease require consistent, attentive management. The DPC model gives your doctor the time and continuity to manage these well.

💬

Anyone Who's Felt Rushed

If you've ever left a doctor's appointment feeling like your questions weren't answered, or like the visit ended before you could say everything — this practice was built for you.

Experience Concierge-Style Care on the Main Line

Start with a free, no-obligation conversation. Meet the physicians, see the practice, and ask everything you want to know — with zero pressure.

Schedule a Free Meet & Greet See Membership Pricing →
Serving the Philadelphia Main Line

Wayne, PA and Surrounding Communities

Wayne, Pennsylvania is a vibrant Philadelphia Main Line community known for its walkable downtown, excellent schools, and family-friendly neighborhoods. Many residents choose personalized primary care that prioritizes prevention, longer visits, and strong doctor–patient relationships — which is the focus of Forward Family Medicine.

We serve Wayne, Berwyn, Devon, Malvern, Paoli, Radnor, Villanova, Newtown Square, and surrounding communities.

Common Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

Most patients who have experienced both traditional and concierge-style care say yes — particularly when the total cost (including copays, deductibles, and the value of time saved) is factored in. Our DPC model keeps the membership fee low enough that the math works for most families.

We do not bill insurance for primary care services. Your monthly membership fee covers all included services. You should maintain health insurance for specialist, hospital, and emergency care.

We keep our panel purposefully limited to ensure every member receives the attention they deserve. Once the panel is full, we maintain a waitlist. We encourage prospective members to reach out early →

Yes. Most members combine our DPC membership with their existing insurance (or switch to a high-deductible plan) for specialist and hospital coverage.

We work collaboratively with specialist physicians and large health systems. You do not need to abandon those relationships — you simply add a primary care physician who is far more accessible and engaged.

More questions? See our full FAQ →

Ready to Experience Medicine the Way It Should Be?

No commitment — just a conversation to see if it's the right fit.

Forward Family Medicine is a Direct Primary Care practice. Membership is not insurance. We recommend pairing DPC with a high-deductible or health-sharing plan.
